zh.conclusion: 美国2月非农就业减少9.2万（预期+5.5万），失业率升至4.4%，12月修正为负增长。Fed 6月降息概率从35%飙至50%

impacts.note: 降息预期回归=流动性宽松信号，但短期被地缘risk-off压制
现货金升至$5,114/oz(+0.8%)，经济走弱+降息预期双重利好
10Y收益率降至4.121%，2Y降至3.542%，债券价格反弹

zh.conclusion: 伊朗遭空袭（伊拉姆+库姆），霍尔木兹海峡事件频发。WTI破$85创2024年4月以来新高，Brent本周飙升18%

impacts.note: 能源股直接受益，CVX逼近52周高$192，XOM逼近$160
WTI $85→$91，若霍尔木兹封锁将突破$100
地缘恐慌+油价飙升→通胀担忧→风险偏好下降

zh.conclusion: 哈萨克斯坦央行将从$690亿外汇储备中投资最多$3.5亿于加密资产，4-5月启动，可能含BTC

impacts.note: 主权基金配置BTC=制度化认可。继萨尔瓦多后又一主权级入场
托管/交易基建受益，机构资金增量
BTC ETF可能成为配置渠道，利好IBIT等

zh.conclusion: SEC永久撤销对孙宇晨和波场基金会的指控，Rainberry支付$1000万罚款了结。ONDO/VIRTUAL被移除种子标签

impacts.note: 最大监管乌云散去，Tron生态信心修复
Binance移除种子标签=交易限制放宽，流动性改善
SEC态度转软信号，监管环境整体改善

en.conclusion: US Feb nonfarm payrolls -92K (exp +55K), unemployment rose to 4.4%, Dec revised to negative growth. Fed June cut probability jumps from 35% to 50%

impacts.note: Rate cut expectations back = liquidity easing signal, but near-term suppressed by geopolitical risk-off
Spot gold rises to $5,114/oz (+0.8%), dual boost from economic weakness + rate cut expectations
10Y yield drops to 4.121%, 2Y to 3.542%, bond prices rally

en.conclusion: Iran struck (Ilam + Qom), Strait of Hormuz incidents ongoing. WTI breaks $85 to highest since April 2024, Brent surges 18% this week

impacts.note: Energy stocks direct beneficiaries; CVX near 52wk high $192, XOM approaching $160
WTI $85→$91; if Hormuz blocked, could break $100
Geopolitical fear + oil spike → inflation concerns → risk-off

en.conclusion: Kazakhstan central bank to invest up to $350M in crypto assets from $69B FX reserves, starting April-May, likely including Bitcoin

impacts.note: Sovereign fund allocating to BTC = institutional legitimacy. Another sovereign entry after El Salvador
Custody/trading infra benefits from institutional inflows
BTC ETFs may serve as allocation vehicle, benefits IBIT etc

en.conclusion: SEC permanently dismisses charges against Justin Sun and Tron Foundation; Rainberry pays $10M fine. ONDO/VIRTUAL seed tags removed on Binance

impacts.note: Biggest regulatory cloud removed, Tron ecosystem confidence restored
Binance seed tag removal = trading restrictions eased, liquidity improves
SEC softening signal, overall regulatory environment improving

duan.title: WTI破$91+霍尔木兹封锁风险，CVX逼近52周高$192
duan.q: 能源是刚需。地缘溢价短期，但FCF是真的。CVX $190以下都值得持有。

duan.title: 非农大幅不及预期→降息概率飙升，COST防御属性凸显
duan.q: 经济放缓时会员制消费更显优势。简单、可预测的现金流。

duan.title: NVDA PE 37x，非农走弱+油价飙升=滞胀风险
duan.q: AI逻辑不变，但宏观逆风加大。$183耐心等，滞胀恐慌可能给$150。

duan.title: 以色列称将追杀哈梅内伊所有继任者，冲突无停火迹象
duan.q: 战争升级不碰。非农+地缘双重打击，持现金等市场出清。

buffett.title: XOM/CVX在$90+油价下现金流暴涨，分红覆盖率充裕
buffett.q: 石油战时更不可替代。XOM $150仍低于内在价值，分红+回购=7%现金回报。

buffett.title: BABA $130 PE 17x，非农走弱利好降息→利好新兴市场
buffett.q: 美国经济走弱→Fed降息→美元走弱→利好中国资产。这个价格有安全边际。

buffett.title: 非农暗示降息加速，BRK浮存金收益率面临拐点
buffett.q: 降息对BRK是双刃剑。但$3733亿现金可以在恐慌中大举抄底。

buffett.title: UNH $289面临营收下滑+油价推高医疗成本双重压力
buffett.q: 医疗成本通胀+营收首次下滑=两面夹击。不急，等明确底部。

munger.title: COST在滞胀环境中反脆弱——越通胀越需要性价比
munger.q: 最爱。非农崩+油价飙=滞胀。滞胀时只有COST这种模式能赢。

munger.title: NVDA长期AI逻辑不变，短期恐慌是买入良机的前兆
munger.q: 反转思维：非农走弱→降息→科技股受益。恐慌往往是最好的买点。

munger.title: SEC撤诉孙宇晨+哈萨克斯坦主权入场=监管转向信号
munger.q: 机构化不可逆。但COIN PE 46x太贵，等COIN跌到$150再说。

munger.title: 非农-9.2万+油价$91+VIX 29=多重恐慌叠加
munger.q: 恐惧指数29说明市场在害怕。但别跟着害怕，也别急着抄底。等待。

duan.title: WTI breaks $91 + Hormuz blockade risk; CVX near 52wk high $192
duan.q: Energy is essential. Geo-premium temporary but FCF is real. CVX below $190 worth holding.

duan.title: NFP massive miss → rate cut odds surge; COST defensive qualities shine
duan.q: Membership model thrives in slowdowns. Simple, predictable cash flow.

duan.title: NVDA PE 37x; weak NFP + oil spike = stagflation risk
duan.q: AI thesis intact but macro headwinds intensify. Wait at $183, stagflation panic may give $150.

duan.title: Israel vows to pursue all Khamenei successors; no ceasefire in sight
duan.q: Escalating war = avoid. NFP + geopolitics double blow. Hold cash, wait for clearing.

buffett.title: XOM/CVX cash flow surging at $90+ oil; dividend coverage ample
buffett.q: Oil is irreplaceable in wartime. XOM at $150 still below intrinsic value. Div+buyback = 7% cash yield.

buffett.title: BABA $130 PE 17x; weak NFP → Fed cuts → USD weakens → benefits EM
buffett.q: US weakness → rate cuts → weaker dollar → benefits Chinese assets. Margin of safety here.

buffett.title: NFP signals accelerated cuts; BRK float yield faces inflection
buffett.q: Rate cuts are double-edged for BRK. But $373B cash means they can buy big in panic.

buffett.title: UNH at $289: revenue decline + oil-driven medical cost inflation
buffett.q: Medical cost inflation + first revenue decline = squeeze. No rush, wait for clear bottom.

munger.title: COST anti-fragile in stagflation — more inflation = more need for value
munger.q: Favorite. NFP collapse + oil spike = stagflation. Only COST's model wins in stagflation.

munger.title: NVDA long-term AI thesis intact; short-term panic = buying opportunity precursor
munger.q: Invert: weak NFP → rate cuts → tech benefits. Panic is often the best entry point.

munger.title: SEC drops Sun case + Kazakhstan sovereign entry = regulatory pivot signal
munger.q: Institutionalization irreversible. But COIN PE 46x too rich. Wait for $150.

munger.title: NFP -92K + oil $91 + VIX 29 = multiple panic layers stacking
munger.q: Fear index at 29 means market is scared. Don't follow the fear, don't bottom-fish yet. Wait.

zh.name: 段永平
zh.opinion: 非农崩+战争升级，持现金等恐慌出清再出手

zh.name: Buffett
zh.opinion: XOM/CVX战时现金牛，BABA $130降息+弱美元双重利好

zh.name: Munger
zh.opinion: 滞胀恐慌是COST的主场，NVDA恐慌后可能给好价格

en.name: DYP
en.opinion: NFP collapse + war escalation — hold cash, wait for panic clearing

en.name: Buffett
en.opinion: XOM/CVX wartime cash cows; BABA $130 benefits from rate cuts + weak USD

en.name: Munger
en.opinion: Stagflation panic is COST's home turf; NVDA may get good price after fear

zh.event: 非农-9.2万(预期+5.5万)，失业率升至4.4%
zh.logic: 经济走弱→Fed 6月降息概率50%→利好成长股估值，但滞胀风险压制整体市场

zh.event: 伊朗遭空袭+以色列誓言追杀继任者
zh.logic: WTI $91+Brent本周飙18%，霍尔木兹封锁风险→能源股现金流暴涨
恐惧指标升高→防御股COST受益；BRK $3733亿现金是恐慌中的优势

zh.event: 哈萨克斯坦主权基金$3.5亿配置加密
zh.logic: 主权级资金入场=BTC制度化认可，COIN托管/交易基建直接受益

zh.event: SEC撤诉孙宇晨+ONDO/VIRTUAL去种子标签
zh.logic: 监管环境全面转暖，SEC态度软化利好整个加密板块

zh.event: Bessent称维护能源市场稳定+Trump允许部分石油销售
zh.logic: 特朗普试图压低油价缓解通胀，但战争持续=油价地板抬高

en.logic: Economic weakness → Fed June cut 50% odds → supports growth valuations, but stagflation risk caps market

en.event: Iran struck + Israel vows to pursue all successors
en.logic: WTI $91 + Brent +18% this week; Hormuz blockade risk → energy FCF surging

en.event: VIX hits 29.5, S&P YTD gains wiped
en.logic: Fear gauge elevated → defensive COST benefits; BRK's $373B cash is advantage in panic

en.event: Kazakhstan sovereign fund allocates $350M to crypto
en.logic: Sovereign-level allocation = BTC institutional legitimacy; COIN custody/trading infra benefits

en.event: SEC dismisses Sun case + ONDO/VIRTUAL seed tags removed
en.logic: Regulatory environment warming across the board; SEC softening benefits entire crypto sector

en.event: Bessent: maintaining energy stability + Trump allows some oil sales
en.logic: Trump trying to cap oil prices to ease inflation, but ongoing war raises oil floor
